'''Dobah''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Phlog/Legends|Phlog]] who lived on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. She was the mate of [[Zut]] and the mother of [[Hoom]] and [[Nahkee]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Dobah was voiced by [[Diane Polley]].<ref name="Diane">{{BookCite|author=Perlmutter, David|title=The Encyclopedia of American Animated Television Shows|publisher=Rowman & Littlefield Publishers|date=2019-05-04|isbn=978-1538103739}}</ref>

==Appearances==
